    Table.playedCards
    Stack of played cards; the top is the currently active card.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Card
    GameLogic.drawFromDeck()
    Draws a card from the deck, refilling it from the table's recycled cards if it is empty.
    Card
    MachineStrategy.Move.getCard()
    Returns the card of this move.
    Card
    Table.getTopCard()
    Returns the card currently on top of the table (the active card).
    Methods in com.example.cincuentazo.model.game that return types with arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Deque<Card>
    Table.collectCardsForRecycling()
    Removes and returns every card on the table except the top one, so that they can be shuffled back into the deck when it runs out.
    Methods in com.example.cincuentazo.model.game with parameters of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private boolean
    GameLogic.cardHasLegalValue(Card card)
    Checks whether a card has at least one value that would be a legal move at the current table sum.
    void
    Table.placeInitialCard(Card card)
    Places the initial card on the table and sets the starting sum.
    void
    GameLogic.playCard(Card card, int chosenValue)
    Attempts to play the given card for the current player using the specified value, enforcing the core rule of the game (HU-3).
    void
    Table.playCard(Card card, int chosenValue)
    Plays a card on the table using the given chosen value, updating the accumulated sum.
